tweets.name: Andrew Chen
tweets.text:
on the “will AI kill jobs?” question- perhaps I have a simplistic view:

Will there be more software in the future? I think yes. Too many people hated previously. Thus will there be more products in the future? Yes. Will there be more companies? Yes. More founders? Yes. 

It may

tweets.name: Andrew Chen
tweets.text:
how to tell the difference between AI-native products versus when AI is bolted on after the fact...

fake AI products:
- main AI feature is an AI button with sparkle icons
- chat pane where you can ask LLM questions
- no memory/personalization beyond one chat
- users try it once
